title: How Do I Delete My Listing?
metaDescription: Sold your car or changed your mind? Learn how to delete your listing on BuyAndScrap.com with our easy, step-by-step guide. It's quick and simple!
targetKeyword: how do i delete my listing
content:
## How Do I Delete My Listing on BuyAndScrap.com?

So, you’ve decided it’s time to take your car advert down from BuyAndScrap.com. Maybe you’ve had a cracking offer and sold your vehicle, or perhaps you’ve simply changed your mind about selling. Whatever the reason, we understand you'll want to know how do I delete my listing quickly and without any fuss. Good news – it's a doddle!

We’ve designed our platform to be as straightforward as possible, ensuring you can manage your listings with ease. Here’s a simple guide to help you remove your advert when you're ready.

### Step-by-Step: How Do I Delete My Listing on BuyAndScrap.com?

Taking down your advert is a quick process, whether you've found a buyer or no longer wish to sell. Follow these steps, and your listing will be removed in no time:

#### 1. Log In to Your Account

First things first, head over to the BuyAndScrap.com website and log in to your personal account. You'll need the email address and password you used when you created your listing. If you've forgotten your password, don't fret – there’s usually a 'forgot password' link to help you out.

#### 2. Navigate to Your Active Listings

Once you’re logged in, look for a section typically labelled 'My Listings', 'My Adverts', or 'Dashboard'. This area is your command centre for all the vehicles you currently have advertised with us. Click on it to see a list of your live ads.

#### 3. Choose to Delete or Mark as Sold

Find the specific listing for the car you want to remove. Next to each active listing, you’ll usually see options like 'Edit', 'View', and crucially, 'Delete' or 'Mark as Sold'.

*   **If you've sold your car**: Select the 'Mark as Sold' option. This is super helpful for us to keep track of successful sales and for other users to see what’s recently been snapped up.
*   **If you're simply removing it**: If you've changed your mind or are no longer selling for any other reason, choose the 'Delete' option. You might be asked to confirm your decision, just to make sure it's not an accidental click.

And just like that, your listing will be removed from BuyAndScrap.com! Simple, right? We believe knowing how do I delete my listing should be as easy as creating one.

### What Happens After I Delete My Listing?

Once you’ve deleted your listing, it will no longer be visible to potential buyers on BuyAndScrap.com. If you marked it as sold, it might appear in a 'recently sold' section for a short period, celebrating your successful sale! Otherwise, it’s simply gone.

### Need a Hand?

If you run into any snags or can't quite figure out how do I delete my listing, don't hesitate to reach out to our friendly support team. We're here to help make your selling experience as smooth as possible.
